event: Still life with sugar candy as a shop signboard
description: A folk-art still life against a black background depicting food items arranged as a shop signboard. In the center, a large white conical sugar loaf stands on a pedestal. To the left, cylindrical sausages and a round plate with items are arranged. To the right, a large fish hangs vertically. A hand reaches in from the right toward a dark rectangular object. The style is flat, naive, and frontal, with pale blue-white and purple tones against the stark black ground. The forms are simplified and boldly outlined.

_meta.title: Still life with sugar candy (part of signboard in Didube)
